title: selaginella cyclophylla
intro: Selaginella cyclophylla, also known as the cyclophyllous spikemoss, is a type of plant in the Selaginella genus that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Selaginella cyclophylla is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water or extracting its active compounds with a solvent like ethanol.
